notes.content: MCP analytics path has reliability/security gaps: middleware fire-and-forget without waitUntil or timeout, spoofable UA gate, fallback IP salt, app-side limited aggregation.
Supabase migration chain issue: 011 recreates allow_insert/allow_select without dropping existing policies created in 010, causing duplicate policy errors on clean bootstrap.
No direct tests found for middleware analytics write path, RLS policies, or mcp-stats aggregation correctness under truncation/high-volume scenarios.
CrashAlert path now validates+escapes, but stock newsletter HTML path still interpolates stock.name/ticker without escaping in sendgrid template.
Twitter crash-alert truncation currently uses JS .length/.slice; add tests using weighted tweet length (CJK/emoji/url) to prevent 400 errors.
